intent_restated: Get the open balance for vendor "Reliance" in production.

Did NOT sum balances across matches — ambiguous which Reliance entity the caller meant.

sources.ref: SELECT id, entityid, companyname FROM vendor WHERE LOWER(companyname) LIKE '%reliance%'
